steps.title: Use the rate
steps.content: The problem gives the point $(2,23)$ and a rate of change of $9$. That means the slope is $9$.

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content: Use $y=9x+b$ and substitute $(2,23)$: $$23=9(2)+b$$ $$23=18+b$$ $$b=5$$ So the model is $y=9x+5$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The correct answer is $y=9x+5$. It has the required rate of change $9$, and $9(2)+5=23$, so C is correct.
